category.scope_note: Respiratory PPE and mask compliance comparison: China domestic (GB 2626 KN95 / YY 0469 / GB 19083) to Australia market (AS/NZS 1716 respiratory protective devices, WHS duties, TGA medical device controls for surgical masks).

title.en: China-to-Australia PPE Respirator and Mask Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国口罩呼吸器进入澳大利亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國口罩呼吸器進入澳大利亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese respiratory PPE and mask documentation against Australian requirements for respirators to AS/NZS 1716, workplace WHS/Safe Work obligations, TGA ARTG medical-device controls for medical or surgical masks, and labelling/claims controls.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国呼吸防护PPE和口罩文件与澳大利亚要求对照，涵盖AS/NZS 1716呼吸器、WHS/Safe Work工作场所义务、TGA对医用或外科口罩的ARTG医疗器械监管，以及标签/声称控制。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國呼吸防護PPE和口罩文件與澳大利亞要求對照，涵蓋AS/NZS 1716呼吸器、WHS/Safe Work工作場所義務、TGA對醫用或外科口罩的ARTG醫療器械監管，以及標籤/聲稱控制。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, TGA determination, WHS regulator decision, standards assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, sponsors, employers, and distributors should verify current Australian law, TGA guidance, WHS duties, AS/NZS standards, state and territory regulator practice, and product claims with qualified regulatory professionals before shipment, supply, or workplace use.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、TGA裁定、WHS监管决定、标准评定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、澳洲申办人、雇主及分销商在出货、供应或工作场所使用前，应与合格的法规专业人士核验现行澳大利亚法律、TGA指南、WHS义务、AS/NZS标准、州及领地监管实践以及产品声称。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、TGA裁定、WHS監管決定、標準評定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、澳洲申辦人、僱主及分銷商在出貨、供應或工作場所使用前，應與合格的法規專業人士核驗現行澳大利亞法律、TGA指南、WHS義務、AS/NZS標準、州及領地監管實踐以及產品聲稱。

answer_first.en: For Australian workplace respiratory protection, respirators are expected to be certified to AS/NZS 1716 and used under an appropriate respiratory protection program, with selection, fit, training, maintenance, and risk controls driven by WHS duties. Medical or surgical masks are a different route: if supplied with therapeutic or surgical/infection-control claims, they are medical devices regulated by the TGA and generally require inclusion in the ARTG unless an exemption applies. Chinese KN95, GB 2626, GB 19083, or YY 0469 documentation does not automatically satisfy Australian AS/NZS 1716, WHS, TGA ARTG, or labelling requirements.
answer_first.zh: 对于澳大利亚工作场所呼吸防护，呼吸器通常应按AS/NZS 1716认证，并在适当的呼吸防护计划下使用；选择、密合、培训、维护及风险控制由WHS义务驱动。医用或外科口罩属于不同路径：若以治疗、外科或感染控制声称供应，则属于TGA监管的医疗器械，通常须列入ARTG，除非适用豁免。中国KN95、GB 2626、GB 19083或YY 0469文件不会自动满足澳大利亚AS/NZS 1716、WHS、TGA ARTG或标签要求。
answer_first.zht: 對於澳大利亞工作場所呼吸防護，呼吸器通常應按AS/NZS 1716認證，並在適當的呼吸防護計劃下使用；選擇、密合、培訓、維護及風險控制由WHS義務驅動。醫用或外科口罩屬於不同路徑：若以治療、外科或感染控制聲稱供應，則屬於TGA監管的醫療器械，通常須列入ARTG，除非適用豁免。中國KN95、GB 2626、GB 19083或YY 0469文件不會自動滿足澳大利亞AS/NZS 1716、WHS、TGA ARTG或標籤要求。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, or primary legal source preferred. TGA, Safe Work Australia, Standards Australia, and Australian legislation URLs are primary sources. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
